sentences.target: Wir genießen den Kuchen auf dem Balkon.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ gəˈniːsn̩ deːn ˈkuːxn̩ aʊf deːm balˈkɔn/

translations.de: Wir genießen den Kuchen auf dem Balkon.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ gəˈniːsn̩ deːn ˈkuːxn̩ aʊf deːm balˈkɔn/
translations.en: We enjoy the cake on the balcony.
translations.es: Disfrutamos del pastel en el balcón.
translations.fr: On savoure du gâteau sur le balcon.
translations.it: Ci godiamo la torta sul balcone.
translations.ko: 우리는 베란다에서 케이크를 맛있게 먹고 있어요.
translations.pt: Estamos apreciando o bolo na varanda.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ăn bánh trên ban công.
translations.nl: We genieten van de taart op het balkon.
translations.hi: हम बालकनी पर केक का आनंद ले रहे हैं.
translations.sv: Vi njuter av tårtan på balkongen.
translations.ro: Ne bucurăm de prăjitură pe balcon.
translations.cs: Na balkóně si pochutnáváme na dortu.
translations.ja: ベランダでケーキを楽しんでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; main predicate meaning ‘to enjoy’.

Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘auf’ (location, dative).

sentences.target: Heute genießen wir das ruhige Frühstück.

translations.de: Heute genießen wir das ruhige Frühstück.
translations.en: Today we’re enjoying a quiet breakfast.
translations.es: Hoy disfrutamos de un desayuno tranquilo.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, on profite d’un petit-déjeuner tranquille.
translations.it: Oggi ci godiamo una colazione tranquilla.
translations.ko: 오늘은 조용한 아침 식사를 즐기고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我们享受一顿安静的早餐。
translations.yue: 今日我哋靜靜咁食早餐。
translations.pt: Hoje estamos apreciando um café da manhã tranquilo.
translations.he: היום אנחנו נהנים מארוחת בוקר שקטה.
translations.tr: Bugün sakin bir kahvaltının keyfini çıkarıyoruz.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi tận hưởng một bữa sáng yên tĩnh.
translations.nl: Vandaag genieten we van een rustig ontbijt.
translations.hi: आज हम शांत नाश्ते का आनंद ले रहे हैं.
translations.nb: I dag nyter vi en rolig frokost.
translations.id: Hari ini kami menikmati sarapan yang tenang.
translations.sv: Idag njuter vi av en lugn frukost.
translations.ro: Astăzi ne bucurăm de un mic dejun liniștit.
translations.da: I dag nyder vi en rolig morgenmad.
translations.ja: 今日は静かな朝食を楽しんでいます。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb placed first; triggers verb–subject inversion.

Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject after inversion.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of ‘Frühstück’.
Attributive adjective modifying ‘Frühstück’; weak inflection, accusative neuter singular.
Common noun, neuter; accusative singular as the direct object of ‘genießen’.

sentences.target: Die Kinder genießen das Eis im Hof.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkɪndɐ gəˈniːsn̩ das aɪ̯s ɪm hoːf/

translations.de: Die Kinder genießen das Eis im Hof.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkɪndɐ gəˈniːsn̩ das aɪ̯s ɪm hoːf/
translations.en: The children are enjoying ice cream in the courtyard.
translations.es: Los niños comen helado en el patio.
translations.fr: Les enfants savourent une glace dans la cour.
translations.it: I bambini si godono il gelato nel cortile.
translations.ko: 아이들이 마당에서 아이스크림을 맛있게 먹고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们在院子里吃冰淇淋。
translations.yue: 小朋友喺天井度食雪糕。
translations.pt: As crianças tomam sorvete no pátio.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ đang ăn kem ở sân.
translations.ar: الأطفال يستمتعون بالآ이스 كريم في الفناء.
translations.nl: De kinderen eten ijs op de binnenplaats.
translations.hi: बच्चे आँगन में आइसक्रीम का आनंद ले रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Dzieci zajadają się lodami ha podwórku.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά απολαμβάνουν παγωτό στην αυλή.
translations.nb: Barna koser seg med iskrem på gårdsplassen.
translations.id: Anak-anak menikmati es krim di halaman.
translations.sv: Barnen njuter av glass på gården.
translations.ro: Copiii ce bucură de înghețată în curte.
translations.cs: Děti si pochutnávají na zmrzlině na dvoře.
translations.ja: 子どもたちは中庭でアイスクリームを楽しんでいます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of the subject.
Common noun, plural; nominative subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; main predicate.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of ‘Eis’.

Common noun, masculine; dative singular as object of the preposition ‘im’ (location).

sentences.target: Touristen genießen die Aussicht vom Turm.

translations.de: Touristen genießen die Aussicht vom Turm.
translations.en: Tourists enjoy the view from the tower.
translations.es: Los turistas disfrutan de las vistas desde la torre.
translations.fr: Les touristes profitent de la vue depuis la tour.
translations.it: I turisti si godono la vista dalla torre.
translations.zh-Hans: 游客们从塔上欣赏风景。
translations.yue: 遊客喺塔上面欣賞景色。
translations.pt: Os turistas apreciam a vista da torre.
translations.vi: Du khách tận hưởng khung cảnh từ trên tháp.
translations.nl: Toeristen genieten van het uitzicht vanaf de toren.
translations.hu: A turisták élvezik a kilátást a toronyból.
translations.hi: पर्यटक मीनार से नज़ारे का आनंद लेते हैं.
translations.el: Οι τουρίστες απολαμβάνουν τη θέα από τον πύργο.
translations.id: Para turis menikmati pemandangan dari menara.
translations.sv: Turister njuter av utsikten från tornet.
translations.ro: Turiștii se bucură de priveliștea de pe turn.
translations.cs: Turisté si užívají výhled z věže.
translations.ja: 観光客たちは塔から景色を楽しんでいます。
